candidates.question:
In what direction(s) does the pendulum rotate?
A. Counter-clockwise then clockwise.
B. Counter-clockwise throughout.
C. Clockwise throughout.
D. Clockwise then counter-clockwise.
E. Rotating back and forth
Answer with one letter only.

description: Selected checked derivative assets used by the publication/review planner appendix figures.

visualization_policy.purpose: Selected candidate windows are rendered with the audited Qwen routing-budget visualization policy; source_jsonl only supplies the video path and row metadata.
visualization_policy.source_row_policy_hint: source_jsonl may come from older planner sweeps; do not treat it as the rendering policy.
